subheadingPl: Jedyna sekcja na stronie, której treści nie wygenerował model językowy. Piszę o tym czego się uczę — AI, trading, handel ilościowy, budowanie systemów bez umiejętności kodowania. Dzielę się w niej własnymi doświadczeniami oraz przemyśleniami.
subheadingEn: The only section on this site whose content was not generated by a language model. Writing about what I'm learning — AI, trading, quantitative trading, building systems without coding skills. I share my own experiences and thoughts here.

articles.bodyPl:
Z pewnoĹ›ciÄ… kaĹĽdy z Was, a na pewno wiÄ™kszoĹ›Ä‡, sĹ‚yszaĹ‚a historiÄ™ o Achillesie â€” najwiÄ™kszym wojowniku wojny trojaĹ„skiej. Nie bÄ™dÄ™ zagĹ‚Ä™biaĹ‚ siÄ™ w szczegĂłĹ‚y tej historii, wiÄ™c jeĹĽeli ktoĹ› jeszcze o niej nie sĹ‚yszaĹ‚, to gorÄ…co zachÄ™cam do nadrobienia zalegĹ‚oĹ›ci w wolnej chwili.

TytuĹ‚ artykuĹ‚u nieprzypadkowo nawiÄ…zuje wĹ‚aĹ›nie do tego wydarzenia. ChciaĹ‚bym podzieliÄ‡ siÄ™ z Wami pewnÄ… historiÄ…, ktĂłra, przynajmniej w mojej opinii, ma wbrew pozorom wiele wspĂłlnego z osobÄ… wyĹĽej wspomnianego, mitycznego bohatera.

Z racji tego, ĹĽe jest to mĂłj pierwszy artykuĹ‚ na stronie i chyba pierwszy w ogĂłle, to warto byĹ‚oby moĹĽe wyjaĹ›niÄ‡ kilka kwestii. Po pierwsze i chyba najwaĹĽniejsze, wszystkie treĹ›ci, ktĂłre tutaj znajdziecie, to moje subiektywne zdanie. Nie prowadzÄ™ ĹĽadnych szkoleĹ„, niczego nie sprzedajÄ™, nie jestem ĹĽadnym guru ani nie posiadam ĹĽadnego formalnego wyksztaĹ‚cenia kierunkowego dotyczÄ…cego finansĂłw, handlu na rynkach walutowych ani ĹĽadnych innych. DzielÄ™ siÄ™ z Wami wĹ‚asnymi przemyĹ›leniami oraz doĹ›wiadczeniami i chÄ™tnie podyskutujÄ™ z kaĹĽdym, kto bÄ™dzie miaĹ‚ ochotÄ™ odnieĹ›Ä‡ siÄ™ merytorycznie do informacji, ktĂłre tutaj znajdzie.

Jak zaczÄ™Ĺ‚a siÄ™ moja przygoda z Forex?

Po przeprowadzce do mojego aktualnego miejsca zamieszkania okoĹ‚o 10 lat temu, zaczÄ…Ĺ‚em pracÄ™ w fabryce czÄ™Ĺ›ci do silnikĂłw samochodowych. MiaĹ‚em wtedy 26 lat. Nie chcÄ™ opisywaÄ‡ tutaj historii mojego ĹĽycia, wiÄ™c powiem krĂłtko: jak dla mnie, na tamten czas, praca byĹ‚a caĹ‚kiem w porzÄ…dku. SkĹ‚amaĹ‚bym mĂłwiÄ…c, ĹĽe byĹ‚a wymagajÄ…ca. Teraz, jak tak sobie o tym pomyĹ›lÄ™, to w zasadzie wystarczyĹ‚o po prostu do niej chodziÄ‡, nie spĂłĹşniaÄ‡ siÄ™ i oczywiĹ›cie byÄ‡ trzeĹşwym. KaĹĽdy, kto pracowaĹ‚ w fabryce, wie, z czym to siÄ™ je, a jeĹ›li ktoĹ› nie pracowaĹ‚â€¦ cĂłĹĽ, wszystko jeszcze przed Wami.

Z upĹ‚ywem lat coraz bardziej zaczÄ™Ĺ‚o do mnie docieraÄ‡, ĹĽe nie jest to coĹ›, co chciaĹ‚bym w ĹĽyciu robiÄ‡. ZaczÄ…Ĺ‚em interesowaÄ‡ siÄ™ rynkiem Forex i, oczywiĹ›cie, moimi pierwszymi ĹşrĂłdĹ‚ami wiedzy byĹ‚y: internet, kanaĹ‚y youtubowe rĂłĹĽnych twĂłrcĂłw, a z czasem ksiÄ…ĹĽki o tematyce tradingowej, psychologii pieniÄ™dzy itd., itp. MuszÄ™ przyznaÄ‡, ĹĽe bardzo mnie to wciÄ…gnÄ™Ĺ‚o, chociaĹĽ na pewno nie muszÄ™ specjalnie tĹ‚umaczyÄ‡ powodĂłw tego stanu rzeczy.

MyĹ›lÄ™, ĹĽe nie minÄ™ siÄ™ zbytnio z prawdÄ…, jeĹ›li zaĹ‚oĹĽÄ™, ĹĽe nie jestem jedynÄ… osobÄ… na Ĺ›wiecie, ktĂłra uwierzyĹ‚a, ĹĽe to, co moĹĽna zobaczyÄ‡ w internecie na temat handlu na rynkach finansowych, to prawda. Niech pierwszy rzuci kamieniem ten, kto nigdy nie daĹ‚ siÄ™ ponieĹ›Ä‡ fantazji bogactwa i leĹĽenia na plaĹĽy z laptopem, popijajÄ…c drinka. Na szczÄ™Ĺ›cie w moim przypadku bardzo szybko siÄ™ opamiÄ™taĹ‚em, zanim straciĹ‚em jakiekolwiek realne pieniÄ…dze.

PrzechodzÄ…c dalej, na poczÄ…tku kwietnia 2025 roku stwierdziĹ‚em, ĹĽe nadszedĹ‚ wreszcie czas na zmiany. ZĹ‚oĹĽyĹ‚em wypowiedzenie i zamierzaĹ‚em poszukaÄ‡ czegoĹ› innego. Podczas meczu piĹ‚ki noĹĽnej zerwaĹ‚em Ĺ›ciÄ™gno Achillesa. Przez ponad 30 lat mojego ĹĽycia nigdy niczego nie zĹ‚amaĹ‚em, nie skrÄ™ciĹ‚em. Dotychczas mojÄ… najpowaĹĽniejszÄ… kontuzjÄ… byĹ‚o wybicie maĹ‚ego palca.

SprĂłbujÄ™ teraz naĹ›wietliÄ‡ Wam mĂłj sposĂłb rozumowania. Na poczÄ…tek odrzuciĹ‚em oczywiste bzdury rĂłĹĽnych guru i innych marketingowych magikĂłw sprzedajÄ…cych kursy za 1000 PLN, jednoczeĹ›nie chwalÄ…cych siÄ™ zarobkami rzÄ™du 8 000 000 PLN rocznie. OsobiĹ›cie przestaĹ‚em wierzyÄ‡ w obietnice Ĺ‚atwych i szybkich zyskĂłw, wolÄ™ podejĹ›cie oparte na danych, statystyce i procesie.

Z racji tego, ĹĽe chciaĹ‚em podejĹ›Ä‡ do tematu tradingu w jak najbardziej profesjonalny sposĂłb, zadaĹ‚em sobie dosyÄ‡ oczywiste pytanie: Jak to robiÄ… profesjonaliĹ›ci? Naturalnie miaĹ‚em Ĺ›wiadomoĹ›Ä‡, ĹĽe nie bÄ™dÄ™ miaĹ‚ dostÄ™pu do zamkniÄ™tych funduszy inwestycyjnych, ĹĽeby podpatrzeÄ‡, jak to wyglÄ…da od Ĺ›rodka w instytucjach, ktĂłre zarzÄ…dzajÄ… milionami dolarĂłw. Moim celem byĹ‚o po prostu nie byÄ‡ kolejnym jeĹşdĹşcem bez gĹ‚owy, ktĂłry bÄ™dzie prĂłbowaĹ‚ przewidzieÄ‡, w jakim kierunku pĂłjdzie cena. Jak juĹĽ wspomniaĹ‚em, nie zamierzaĹ‚em teĹĽ opieraÄ‡ siÄ™ na tym, co widziaĹ‚em na YouTube. PoczytaĹ‚em trochÄ™ i zdecydowaĹ‚em, ĹĽe pĂłjdÄ™ Ĺ›cieĹĽkÄ… analizy danych i statystyki. Na wĹ‚asnej skĂłrze przekonaĹ‚em siÄ™ rĂłwnieĹĽ, ĹĽe kiedy w grÄ™ wchodzÄ… realne pieniÄ…dze, to podejmowanie decyzji wyglÄ…da zupeĹ‚nie inaczej niĹĽ w przypadku, kiedy mamy do czynienia z wirtualnym kapitaĹ‚em, co jeszcze bardziej utwierdziĹ‚o mnie w przekonaniu, ĹĽe muszÄ™ usunÄ…Ä‡ z rĂłwnania najsĹ‚absze ogniwo â€” czyli siebie samego.

JuĹĽ wczeĹ›niej prĂłbowaĹ‚em oczywiĹ›cie tworzyÄ‡ wĹ‚asne strategie na platformie TradingView, jednak ani nie przeprowadzaĹ‚em rzetelnych backtestĂłw, ani nie miaĹ‚em na poczÄ…tku Ĺ›wiadomoĹ›ci, jak tak naprawdÄ™ wyglÄ…dajÄ… koszty transakcyjne itd. Jednak najwiÄ™kszy problem stanowiĹ‚o dla mnie coĹ› innego. MusiaĹ‚em w jakiĹ› sposĂłb zautomatyzowaÄ‡ otwieranie pozycji. Niestety moja wiedza programistyczna, ĹĽe tak siÄ™ wyraĹĽÄ™ â€” nie istniaĹ‚a. W przeszĹ‚oĹ›ci prĂłbowaĹ‚em jakichĹ› kursĂłw internetowych z Pythona, ale po kilku dniach zapaĹ‚ gasĹ‚.

Pierwsze spotkanie z ChatGPT

KrÄ…ĹĽÄ…c w sieci, przypadkowo natrafiĹ‚em na jakÄ…Ĺ› reklamÄ™ ChatGPT i nagle mnie olĹ›niĹ‚o. Przyznam, ĹĽe wczeĹ›niej nie interesowaĹ‚em siÄ™ zbytnio sztucznÄ… inteligencjÄ…. MoĹĽe to wydawaÄ‡ siÄ™ Ĺ›mieszne, teraz sam siÄ™ z tego Ĺ›miejÄ™, kiedy o tym pomyĹ›lÄ™, ale na tamten moment naprawdÄ™ nie mogĹ‚em w to uwierzyÄ‡. ZdarzaĹ‚o mi siÄ™ nie jeĹ›Ä‡ przez kilkanaĹ›cie godzin i w ogĂłle nie zwracaĹ‚em na to uwagi. Nic innego siÄ™ nie liczyĹ‚o, tylko wykonaÄ‡ zadanie.

Z racji tego, ĹĽe nie miaĹ‚em wczeĹ›niej do czynienia z modelami jÄ™zykowymi, to moĹĽecie sobie wyobraziÄ‡, ĹĽe prĂłba wyciÄ…gania kolejnych czÄ™Ĺ›ci kodu od mojego wirtualnego programisty szĹ‚a mi raczej opornie. OczywiĹ›cie nie miaĹ‚em pojÄ™cia, co to jest i do czego sĹ‚uĹĽy, ale wĹ‚aĹ›nie w tym rzeczâ€¦ po prostu nie musiaĹ‚em tego wiedzieÄ‡ na tym etapie. CaĹ‚a tzw. brudna robota naleĹĽaĹ‚a do niego, mojego super szybkiego programisty, ktĂłry nie pobiera pensji, nie mÄ™czy siÄ™, nie musi jeĹ›Ä‡ ani spaÄ‡. Ponownie staĹ‚em siÄ™ operatorem, z tÄ… rĂłĹĽnicÄ…, ĹĽe teraz, zamiast obsĹ‚ugiwaÄ‡ panel maszyny CNC, instruowaĹ‚em model jÄ™zykowy, prĂłbujÄ…c prawidĹ‚owo zobrazowaÄ‡ mu mojÄ… wizjÄ™.

Nie chodzi o to, ĹĽeby zostaÄ‡ zawodowym programistÄ…. Dwa okienka konsoli, w jednym FastAPI, w drugim ngrok, wygenerowany przykĹ‚adowy webhook wklejony do trzeciego okienka konsoli iiiiiâ€¦ dĹşwiÄ™k terminala, otwarto pozycjÄ™ 0.01 lot na EURUSDâ€¦ sukcesâ€¦

MyĹ›lÄ™, ĹĽe to wydarzenie totalnie mnie zmieniĹ‚o. Przez kolejne miesiÄ…ce pracowaĹ‚em nad automatyzacjÄ… handlu. OczywiĹ›cie bywaĹ‚y okresy lepsze i gorsze, okresy euforii, ale rĂłwnieĹĽ frustracji i wĹ›ciekĹ‚oĹ›ci... o tym moĹĽe innym razem.

Czego nauczyĹ‚a mnie ta historia?

Moja kontuzja okazaĹ‚a siÄ™ szczÄ™Ĺ›ciem w nieszczÄ™Ĺ›ciu. W mitologii piÄ™ta Achillesa byĹ‚a jego sĹ‚abym punktem, jedynym miejscem, w ktĂłre moĹĽna byĹ‚o go zraniÄ‡. To by byĹ‚o na tyle, jeĹĽeli chodzi o poczÄ…tek mojej przygody. Mam nadziejÄ™, ĹĽe Was nie zanudziĹ‚em. Zawsze byĹ‚em dosyÄ‡ wygadany, wiÄ™c liczÄ™, ĹĽe mi wybaczycie. W nastÄ™pnych publikacjach bÄ™dÄ™ skupiaĹ‚ siÄ™ bardziej konkretnie na tematach stricte tradingowych, strategiach, ale rĂłwnieĹĽ moich przemyĹ›leniach odnoĹ›nie do algotradingu, handlu iloĹ›ciowego, analizy danych oraz statystyki. JeĹĽeli udaĹ‚o Ci siÄ™ dotrwaÄ‡ do koĹ„ca, to serdecznie dziÄ™kujÄ™, ale rĂłwnieĹĽ wspĂłĹ‚czujÄ™.
articles.bodyEn:
Surely everyone, or at least most of you, has heard the story of Achilles â€” the greatest warrior of the Trojan War. I won't dive into the details of that story, so if anyone hasn't heard it yet, I warmly encourage you to catch up in your free time.

The title of this article is no accident, it references exactly that event. I'd like to share a story with you that, at least in my opinion, has more in common with the aforementioned mythical hero than it might seem at first glance.

Since this is my first article on the site, and probably my first ever, it's probably worth clarifying a few things. First, and perhaps most importantly: everything you'll find here is my subjective opinion. I don't run any training courses, I'm not selling anything, I'm not any kind of guru, and I have no formal education in finance, currency trading, or anything related. I'm sharing my own thoughts and experiences with you, and I'm happy to discuss with anyone who wants to engage substantively with the content you'll find here.

How My Forex Journey Began

About 10 years ago, after moving to my current place of residence, I started working at a car engine parts factory. I was 26 at the time. I don't want to tell my entire life story here, so I'll keep it short: as far as I was concerned, the job was perfectly fine back then. I'd be lying if I said it was demanding. Looking back now, you basically just had to show up, not be late, and, of course, be sober. Anyone who's worked in a factory knows what it's like, and if you haven'tâ€¦ well, you've got it all ahead of you.

As the years went by, it started dawning on me more and more that this wasn't something I wanted to do with my life. I started getting interested in the Forex market, and, of course, my first sources of knowledge were: the internet, YouTube channels of various creators, and over time, books on trading, the psychology of money, and so on. I have to admit it really pulled me in, although I certainly don't need to explain the reasons for that state of affairs.

I don't think I'd be far from the truth if I assumed I'm not the only person in the world who believed that what you see on the internet about trading financial markets is true. It seems absurd to me now, but I'll admit it openly, back then I genuinely believed that people were making thousands of dollars a day en masse, that they practically never lost money, and of course, the ubiquitous slogans: 90â€“95% win rate, all you have to do is buy my course.

Let he who has never been swept away by fantasies of wealth and lying on a beach with a laptop, sipping a drink, cast the first stone. Fortunately, in my case, I came to my senses very quickly, before I lost any real money.

The Torn Achilles and an Unexpected Twist

Moving on, at the beginning of April 2025, I decided it was finally time for a change. I handed in my notice and planned to look for something else. I was going to casually browse job offers and figure out what I could do. Of course, I wasn't even thinking about trading professionally. But then something happened that pushed over the first dominoâ€¦

During a football match, I ruptured my Achilles tendon. In over 30 years of my life, I had never broken or sprained anything. Until then, my most serious injury had been dislocating my little toe.

When I found out I'd be grounded for the next several months, I wasn't exactly bursting with optimism at first. Surgery, cast, orthosis, walking on crutches, rehabilitation â€” the prospect of spending the next few months like that wasn't exactly appealing.

I try to be an optimist in daily life, so I started thinking about how to make the best use of this time. I wasn't going to spend it watching every possible series on Netflix. So I decided to get serious about trading. And that's exactly what I did.

If I had to pick one thing that comes to mind when I think about my previous job and that helped me tremendously in my current pursuits, it would be PROCESS. Let me try to shed some light on my way of thinking. First, I discarded the obvious nonsense from various gurus and other marketing magicians selling courses for 1000 PLN while boasting about earnings of 8,000,000 PLN per year. Personally, I stopped believing in promises of easy, quick profits, I prefer an approach grounded in data, statistics, and process.

Since I wanted to approach trading as professionally as possible, I asked myself a fairly obvious question: How do the professionals do it? Naturally, I was aware I wouldn't have access to closed investment funds to peek inside institutions managing millions of dollars. My goal was simply not to be another headless rider trying to predict which direction the price would go. As I already mentioned, I also wasn't going to rely on what I saw on YouTube. I did some reading and decided to go down the path of data analysis and statistics. If Forex trading is currently dominated by algorithms, I wasn't going to do it manually. I also learned firsthand that when real money is at stake, decision-making looks completely different than with virtual capital, which further reinforced my belief that I needed to remove the weakest link from the equation: myself.

I had of course tried creating my own strategies on the TradingView platform before, but I neither conducted proper backtests nor was initially aware of what transaction costs actually look like. However, the biggest problem for me was something else. I needed to somehow automate opening positions. What good was a signal from a strategy if, for example, I wasn't at my computer at the time? Playing on the M5 interval, you can't afford a few minutes of delay.

Unfortunately, my programming knowledge, so to speak â€” was non-existent. In the past, I had tried some online Python courses, but after a few days, the enthusiasm fizzled out.

First Encounter with ChatGPT

While browsing the web, I accidentally came across an ad for ChatGPT, and suddenly it hit me. I'll admit, I hadn't been particularly interested in artificial intelligence before. Of course, I had heard about it, but mostly in the context of generating funny pictures or memes. Looking back, I simply can't believe why it didn't occur to me earlier to use a language model to solve my problem. It's so completely obviousâ€¦ yesâ€¦ it's completely obvious, but only in this moment. Sometimes the hardest thing is to stumble upon the simplest solutionsâ€¦

Lying in bed with my leg in a cast, I simply asked ChatGPT how to automate a strategy from TradingView. Whether it was even possible to do it in a way that would send the strategy signal to MT4. I pressed Enterâ€¦ and suddenly I was in shockâ€¦ Not only did I get an affirmative answer within seconds, but also an immediate sketch of what it could look like. Do you understand? It might seem funny, now I laugh about it myself when I think about it, but at that moment, I truly couldn't believe it. I just couldn't believe it was that simple. Suddenly it dawned on me that a problem which had seemed unsolvable had, in a single moment, completely ceased to exist.

From that moment on, I fell into a kind of positive obsession. For the first time in my life, I experienced what the so-called FLOW state truly means. I thought about nothing else but getting that first position opened automatically in the terminal as fast as possible. I lost track of time, hours flew by like minutes. I would go without food for over a dozen hours and not even notice. Nothing else mattered except completing the task.

Opening the First Position, Automation

Given that I had no prior experience with language models, you can imagine that trying to extract successive pieces of code from my virtual programmer went rather roughly at first. I decided we'd start with the simplest thing, trying to open any position in the terminal automatically, or rather, semi-automatically at firstâ€¦ Chat suggested the simplest solution: FastAPI and ngrok in the free version. Of course, I had no clue what those were or what they were for, but that's exactly the pointâ€¦ I simply didn't need to know at that stage. What dawned on me then was something not entirely intuitive but profoundly true. Having access to a language model, my role wasn't to explain programming, it was to describe what I wanted to do and what result I wanted to achieve. All the so-called dirty work belonged to him, my super-fast programmer who doesn't draw a salary, doesn't get tired, doesn't need to eat or sleep. I once again became an operator, with the difference that now, instead of operating a CNC machine panel, I was instructing a language model, trying to properly convey my vision to it.

An important caveat: in the beginning, you can indeed build a lot without deep programming knowledge. However, as the complexity of a project grows, especially when real money is at stake, understanding what's happening under the hood becomes increasingly important. It's not about becoming a professional developer. It's about knowing enough not to rely solely on blind faith in code whose behavior you don't fully understand.

After a few days, I was ready to run the first test. I'll admit, I was a bit nervous because the early days of working with my buddy weren't the easiest. It was definitely due to my lack of experience, but all I cared about was finally getting that first position opened without manually using the terminal, so it didn't matter to me at all. Two console windows, FastAPI in one, ngrok in the other, a sample webhook pasted into a third console window, annnndâ€¦ the sound of the terminal, a 0.01 lot position opened on EURUSDâ€¦ successâ€¦

I think that event completely changed me. I understood that the only thing limiting me is my imagination, that without knowing anything about programming, I would be able to create something great. Over the following months, I worked on trade automation. Of course, there were better and worse periods, periods of euphoria, but also frustration and rage... but that's a story for another time.

What This Story Taught Me

My injury turned out to be a blessing in disguise. In mythology, the Achilles heel was his weak point, the only place where he could be wounded. In my case, the ruptured "Achilles" became the beginning of something entirely new. Paradoxically, it was this forced stop that allowed me to set off in a completely different direction. Because I was grounded, I had an enormous amount of time to develop my applications, and I'm convinced I wouldn't be at this stage without that event.

That's it as far as the beginning of my journey goes. I hope I didn't bore you. I've always been fairly talkative, so I hope you'll forgive me. In future posts, I'll focus more specifically on strictly trading-related topics, strategies, as well as my thoughts on algotrading, quantitative trading, data analysis, and statistics. If you managed to stick with me to the end, thank you sincerely, and alsoâ€¦ my condolences.
